---
title: "Teaching"
description-meta: "Teaching activities of Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: True
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---
<!--subtitle: "Teaching, Mentoring and Student Supervision"-->
<!--# Teaching Philosophy

I believe that mathematics is best learned through a combination of rigorous theory, computational experimentation, and real-world applications. My teaching integrates mathematical foundations with modern computational tools, enabling students to connect abstract concepts with scientific and engineering problems.

I encourage active learning through discussions, programming assignments, mathematical modelling, and research-oriented projects.

--- -->

# Courses Taught

<!--## National Institute of Technology Warangal-->

| Course | Year | Class |
|:-------|:---------|:---------|
| Probability and Statistics (MA1001) | 2022-2023 | B.Tech ECE, National Institute of Technology Puducherry |
|Probability and Random Processes (MA222)| 2023-2024 | B.Tech ECE, National Institute of Technology Puducherry |

# Teaching Interests

I am interested in developing courses on

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Dynamical Systems
- Neural Differential Equations
- Numerical Methods
- Probability and Statistics
- Stochastic Processes
- Regression analysis and GLM
- Mathematical Modelling
- Control Theory

---
